notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Miles Mastrobuoni grounds into a force out, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Miles Mastrobuoni advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Chaparro pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Chaparro doubles (3) on a fly ball to left fielder Luke Raley.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Chaparro pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Chaparro flies out to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.

notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder singles on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile.

notableEvents.label: Victor Robles GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Victor Robles grounds into a double play, third baseman Curtis Mead to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Andrés Chaparro. Rob Refsnyder to 3rd. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Victor Robles out at 1st.
